title: Integrate duty cycle into lichen_lora_l2_tx and add CONFIG
description: Edit l2/Kconfig to add CONFIG_LICHEN_DUTY_CYCLE=y default. Add static tracker in lora_l2.c, init it, call before send in lichen_lora_l2_tx if enabled (use estimated airtime or record after). Return duty error if cannot transmit.
close_reason: Integrated duty cycle with Kconfig default y, cleaned duplicate tracker in lora_l2_tx, updated API docs, verified with existing CCP-13 tests
